items.name: ilovepdf
items.description: Merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs with simple browser-based tools.

items.name: LightPDF
items.description: All-in-one PDF toolkit. Convert, edit, compress, merge, and sign PDFs directly in your browser.

items.name: ImageColorPicker
items.description: Pick exact colors from images and get HEX, RGB, and other values instantly.

items.name: BulkResizePhotos
items.description: Resize, crop, and compress multiple images in bulk directly in your browser.

items.name: OnlineOCR
items.description: Extract text from images, PDFs, and scans using OCR with quick file conversion.

items.name: pairdrop
items.description: Send files instantly between devices over WiFi with no setup or login.
